sentence_analyses.grammar_notes: 一点 can soften degree: 'a little'.

chapter_notes: This chapter includes many non-dialogue OCR lines: credits, signage, sound effects, page fragments, and end-matter promotional text. They are still analyzed in order.
Obvious OCR corrections were made conservatively in normalized_text where highly likely, including 将 for 讲, 竟 for 竞, 千万 for 干万, and several missing 支/大 characters in end-matter promo lines.
Colloquial forms such as 天呐, 啥, 咋, 玩意儿, 那儿, 干吗, and 哪儿 were preserved as intentional character voice.
Several lines are split across bubbles or OCR segments; translations use chapter context to reflect the intended full utterance while keeping each analysis anchored to its own token ids.
